modules.sanadOfficeDesc: Government service centres — applications, staff, and performance tracking
modules.proVisaDesc: Work permits, residence visas, labour cards, PASI, and Ministry of Labour filings
modules.hrWorkforceDesc: Employees, leave management, payroll, WPS, and Omanisation tracking
modules.smartContractsDesc: Draft, negotiate, and digitally sign contracts with full audit trail
modules.serviceMarketplaceDesc: Connect with verified PRO service providers across Oman and GCC
modules.crmPipelineDesc: Manage clients, deals, and business development pipeline
modules.payrollEngineDesc: WPS-compliant payroll, PASI deductions, salary loans, and payslips
modules.expiryAlertsDesc: Real-time alerts for visas, permits, contracts, and compliance deadlines

noCriticalAlerts: No critical alerts at this time. Your operations are running smoothly.
focusPrioritiesHint: Queue order only — permissions unchanged. Use the sidebar for every module.

preCompany.subtitle: Set up your business workspace — create a company or join a team to unlock SmartPRO’s business tools.
preCompany.heroTitle: Create or join a company workspace
preCompany.heroBody: Create a company workspace or join an existing team. Until then, this is your personal setup area — not a live tenant dashboard.
preCompany.joinHint: Have an invite? Open the link from your email to join. You can also explore the guide below while you wait.
preCompany.activityHint: Your workspace activity will appear here after you create or join a company.

cards.profileDesc: Add your details so teammates and providers recognize your account.
cards.guideDesc: Walk through modules and recommended setup order.
cards.inviteDesc: Use the secure invite link from your organization’s admin to join their workspace.
cards.marketplaceDesc: Browse the marketplace for PRO and government-related services.
